name: Gather
description: AI-powered grocery shopping list PWA with real-time sync, shared lists, recipes, and image search

commands.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
commands.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios

integrations.name: supabase
integrations.purpose: Auth, Postgres DB, Realtime, Storage, Edge Functions

integrations.name: walmart-affiliate
integrations.purpose: Primary product image search via Supabase Edge Function

integrations.name: openfoodfacts
integrations.purpose: Secondary fallback image search for grocery items (free, no API key)

integrations.name: serpapi
integrations.purpose: Tertiary fallback image search via Supabase Edge Function

integrations.name: capacitor
integrations.purpose: Native iOS app shell wrapping the React PWA for App Store distribution
